description_long: This house features a modern, multi-level design built into a sloped terrain, with a prominent flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior combines white and light gray walls with sections of stone cladding and black vertical accents, creating a striking visual contrast. The front facade includes a double garage with two cars, a paved driveway, and a recessed entryway sheltered by the upper floor. Large windows are asymmetrically placed, allowing ample natural light and offering views from multiple rooms. The landscaping incorporates green lawns on both sides, with retaining walls following the slope of the lot. The rear of the house features a stepped design, with terraces and outdoor spaces accessible from different levels.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, stone and white exterior, and integrated garage, built into a sloped lot with green landscaping. Asymmetrical windows and clean lines define its contemporary style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the house's integration into a steep slope, with visible retaining walls and a mix of stone and white surfaces.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the double garage, paved driveway, main entryway, and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing stepped terraces, sloped landscaping, and additional windows along the side elevation.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the flat roof, upper terrace, and the house's multi-level structure as it follows the terrain.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, steps leading up from the driveway, and a double garage integrated into the facade.
